Working at Nike has been an incredibly rewarding experience. The company fosters a collaborative, inclusive culture focused on innovation and growth. There are great opportunities for career development, with strong mentorship and a supportive leadership team. Nike values work-life balance, offering flexible schedules and wellness programs. The benefits package is excellent, with comprehensive health coverage and ex...
Benefits, swag, cool campus, brand recognition High School Politics + Poor Leadership

Working at Nike was truly inspiring. The team environment was supportive and motivating. I learned a lot about customer experience and brand storytelling. The brand culture encouraged growth, passion, and excellence. I genuinely enjoyed representing such a globally respected company. good good

Nike offers strong compensation, benefits, and brand visibility that can meaningfully accelerate your career. Youâll work alongside talented designers and cross-functional partners, and the work can be creatively fulfilling when priorities are clear. Flexibility exists in many teams, though itâs largely manager-dependent. The company name alone opens doors. Work here for a good time, not a long time.
- Work with great people - Lots of opportunities for personal growth - Flexible schedule Great place to work on a day to day basis
Employee discount & benefits Mental health resources Friendly work environment Career opportunities Diverse and inclusive workplace Love / Hate
Very good benefits and great community. Fantastic Community

Great benefits and PTO policy. Flexible work environment. Pay is generally good. Great peers and colleagues. Workout opportunities at campus. Buildings and facilities infrastructure at WHQ is beautiful. Greatness to Mediocrity
Very friendly work environment, the people who work there are all amazing Summer review
Friendly environment and flexible hours for a student. Great experience

This could be an amazing place to work, but the management in this district and store do not abide by the Nike core values. The leadership has never worked outside of Nike and has no idea how to manage people and relationships. Poor petty management
With the same team over and over and over again Ok if you like staying the course and job security

great 401k and heath care packages as well as stock. Nike
Free shoes, pay, lifting heavy things. good until it's not

Very political environment, upper management is not invested in their people, and there is a high level of turnover without backfill or promotion. Good benefits but no growth

management sometimes did not have good floor plans and scheduling to maximize work Great tier 1 company

The company's strength is storytellingâthe problem is when it weaves a compelling story externally about its progressive values, only to be undermined by continued discriminatory behavior internally. The publicly-documented culture of gender discrimination, boys club, and toxic leadership behaviors is still alive and well. There is an ingrained culture of promoting charismatic career-climbers in leadership positio...

Current leadership, woke culture, carrier growth is limited. Working at Nike
Poor leadership especially the CEO Low morale
Beaurocracy. Lack of decision rights. Senior leaders lack willingness to act or make decisions. Executice leadership reeks of insincerity. Love the company, not current leadership
Horrible pay, terrible work environment, lack of respect for my time, toxic team, terrible management, lack of diversity and many more. Toxic Management and team

Favoritism and AHC donât train you at all here at this location (L.M and J.W) gets you on a termination that you never been on a corrective EVER!!!!! They trained you to do the right thing and let you fall and focus on yourself. Area director doesnât think itâs favoritism and donât hold no one accountable but just the coaches. Will never work with this company again they let me down. Favoritism

Lack of accountability not only at the very top but all around. No accountability for bad behavior, slow delivery, or incompetence. Don't bother to come here if you work hard, appreciate metrics, and deliver results. Arm flailing and BS year over year are what you need to work here. Zero accountability. Zero leadership. Complete BS.

management favoritism messy environment unfair not the best butâ¦
No work life balance. Micromanaging. Hustle mentality. Thumbs up emoji

Current market situaion is not very good for the company I recommend Nike to anyone

No work life balance. Popularity contest. Just do it cautiously
Toxic environment depending on leadership. Can often feel micromanaged and every move is supervised. Great company but toxic environment depending on store leadership
No consistency in goals. No desire to make actual changes that improve the business. Focused too much on presentations and not on content and teamwork. Not as great as they used to be
I do not have any Great company
Full-time is not always available. Great work environment
bad management, people don't get transparency here Good people around, but bad management
